data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for delivery confirmation.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aims to validate the requirement for delivery confirmation, which includes capturing a customer signature and a photo of the delivered item. However, the evidence provided does not include any concrete API reads or checks that demonstrate the implementation of these functionalities. Prior steps focus on other aspects of the saga, indicating a gap in coverage for this specific requirement.
gaps: No evidence of signature capture functionality or related API endpoints.
No evidence of photo documentation linked to signature functionality or related API endpoints.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence for signature capture
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the signature capture requirement.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence for photo documentation
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the photo documentation linked to signature requirement.
